text:
Owner-curated Subspace Designs resource
The supplied directory recommends Subspace Designs for rigging plates: https://www.subspacedesigns.shop/.
The inspected shop pages describe made-to-order suspension rings and custom builds in certified 6061-T6 aluminum, with anodized finishes in multiple colors and custom concepts accepted. The home page markets the hardware as FEA and third-party tested, but the public engineering and safety page exposed placeholder content during collection, so those marketing load or testing claims should not be treated as independently verified.
title: Owner-curated Subspace Designs resource
